author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Escape Velocity is Now Live!

Star Atlas is ready to make history with Escape Velocity.  

In this tech preview of Star Atlas: Golden Era, you'll test revolutionary real-time on-chain movement - and collect loot in the process! With this real-time technology, you're simultaneously flying across deep space in Star Atlas and through the live Solana blockchain. 

We aim to build the best possible gaming experience for our community, and your feedback is essential. We opened two new channels to elevate your Escape Velocity experience. 

• ⁠unknown 
• ⁠unknown 

Below is a step-by-step guide on how to test. Enjoy and don't forget to show us what loot you find!

  | Play NOW: https://sage.staratlas.com/
